ogTitle: Pemberton vs Peppermint Grove: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Pemberton and Peppermint Grove.
heading: Pemberton vs Peppermint Grove — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Pemberton, Western Australia and Peppermint Grove, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Pemberton has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Peppermint Grove (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Pemberton or Peppermint Grove safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Pemberton has a flood risk score of 22/100, while Peppermint Grove scores 42/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Pemberton scores 41/100 for bushfire risk. Peppermint Grove scores 36/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Pemberton or Peppermint Grove?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Pemberton has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.45% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
